gestures.mdmPrompt: a person stands tall, opens arms wide while explaining multiplication as adding equal groups, engaging the audience with enthusiasm
a tutor points forward with their right hand, shifts weight slightly, and emphasizes the groups of apples as they guide through the example
a person leans slightly forward, raises both hands to count off the numbers, inviting participation while asking about the multiplication
a tutor steps confidently, raises their right hand slightly as they ask about the result of multiplication, indicating importance and encouraging answers
a person stands grounded, opens arms wide again as they reinstate the concept of multiplication as repeated addition, expressing clarity and support
a tutor points with their left hand, stepping slightly forward, while emphasizing the new example of bags and oranges to guide understanding
a tutor stands firm, clasps both hands together as they encourage students to retry the original question about multiplication, showing confidence and support
